691d18eedd1d63a6adb63605.question: This writer claimed that Debussy was so sensitive to being compared with Ernest Fanelli that he would flee cafés where Fanelli was playing in one of the music reviews this person wrote as “William Atheling” for the Transatlantic Review. 691d18eedd1d63a6adb63605.answer_sanitized: Ezra Pound [or Ezra Weston Loomis Pound]
